title: Uruguayan Spicy Pretzel Crumble
description: A unique take on a traditional crumble, this Uruguayan-inspired dessert combines the flavors of spicy and sweet with the crunch of a pretzel topping.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine sliced apples, brown sugar, and cinnamon. Mix until apples are evenly coated.
In a separate bowl, combine flour and spicy pretzel crumbs. Mix until well combined.
Add cold butter to the flour mixture and use a pastry blender or your fingers to work it into the mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs.
Transfer the apple mixture to a 9x9 inch baking dish and top with the crumb mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the apples are tender.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
